title: Penguin Home Saucepan 20cm, 2.5 Litre Stainless Steel Sauce Pan with Glass Lid Induction Safe/Saucepan Set with Double Pouring Lips/MilkPan Cookware Set Cooking Pots & Pans/Dishwasher Safe
features: 𝗣𝗥𝗘𝗠𝗜𝗨𝗠 𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗨𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡 : Crafted with high - quality stainless steel , these saucepans boast a mirror finish and robust durability , ensuring long - lasting performance in your kitchen
𝗗𝗨𝗔𝗟 𝗣𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗩𝗘𝗡𝗜𝗘𝗡𝗖𝗘 : Featuring double pouring lips and a built-in spout , these saucepans enable effortless pouring of sauces , gravies , and more making cooking a breeze.
𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗘𝗥𝗢𝗨𝗦 𝗖𝗔𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗜𝗧𝗬 : 2.5 litre capacity , perfect for cooking sauces , soups , and milk , 20cm diameter, ideal for everyday cooking needs.
𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗙𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗔𝗟 𝗖𝗢𝗢𝗞𝗜𝗡𝗚 - Compatible with all hobs including induction. High grade polish makes for easy cleaning and it is dishwasher safe. Oven Safe upto 180 Celcius , Dishwasher safe.
𝗖𝗔𝗨𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡 : steel handles can get very hot during use. We recommend use of oven gloves while handling hot pans

Cook with Confidence and Convenience Penguin Home Saucepan Set - Stainless Steel Cookware for Every Kitchen Transform your cooking experience with the Penguin Home Saucepan Set, designed to bring out the chef in you. Crafted with precision and built to last, this set of three stainless steel And Bakelite Handle Saucepans (16cm, 18cm, and 20cm) is perfect for every kitchen. Whether you're an amateur cook or a seasoned pro, these saucepans will elevate your culinary creations.
